since_last: 70% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.71%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 70% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.50% · BTC -2.39% · Gold +0.88% · Nasdaq100 +1.53%. 70% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.71%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.71%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.33%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +13.46%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +13.46%, AMBA +11.17%, AMD +9.63%, ANET +9.52%, VRT +8.56%. Laggards: AVAV -6.76%, INTU -3.65%, UPST -3.65%, WDAY -3.22%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.35% at $162.56
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
